docs.title: React Official Documentation
docs.description: The canonical React documentation site. Covers concepts, guides, API reference, and best practices maintained by the React team.

docs.title: React Learn
docs.description: Interactive, step-by-step tutorial for learning React from scratch. Ideal for beginners and returning developers.

docs.description: Comprehensive API reference for React hooks, components, and APIs.

docs.title: React DOM API Reference
docs.description: API reference for react-dom, including rendering APIs, form actions, and browser DOM utilities.

docs.title: React Docs Source (GitHub)
docs.description: The raw Markdown source of the React documentation. Useful for bulk ingestion or offline reading.
